basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Project Associate - I Notification 2026 has been officially released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Guwahati Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E. or M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical/Electrical/CSE or allied disciplines with valid GATE score
qualification.details: B.Tech./B.E. in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, or allied disciplines with a valid GATE score OR M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, or allied disciplines with a valid GATE score. Preferred Areas: AI & ML, Image processing, Software Development, Automation and Control Systems, Robotics and Mechatronics, Data Analytics & Digital Manufacturing, Industrial IoT (IIoT) and Smart Manufacturing.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Guwahati Project Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IIT Guwahati recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Guwahati recruitment is Project Associate – I. This is a contractual position offered by the institute.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate – I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate – I post in the IIT Guwahati recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-In. Candidates need to attend the interview in person on the specified date and venue.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate – I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate – I position will receive a salary of Rs. 44400 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech./B.E. or M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical/Electrical/CSE or allied disciplines with a valid GATE score to be eligible.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the date of the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Associate – I position will be held on 29 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this position?
faq.answer: The job location for this position is Guwahati, Assam.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
